findings_history.notes: Maintenance scan. No new actionable issues. 17 useEffect blocks flagged as 'missing cleanup' are all false positives (state-sync effects). 13 eslint-disable comments all have reasons. Codebase is healthy. Remaining deferred: 12 files >400 lines (large refactors, not QA).

Covered new graphStyles.ts (extracted from useGraphInit in a refactor) with 29 assertions — computeNodeStyle and computeEdgeStyle, including mastery donuts, collapsed/expanded suffixes, custom colors, directed edges, line styles, label metadata. Relaxed LRU cache perf threshold 20ms→100ms (was flaky on Windows with Docker running). Security scan: no dangerouslySetInnerHTML, no eval, no 'as any' in production. Code quality: no new findings — 12 long files still deferred from cycle 6. All 1630 tests green.

Upgraded warnIfNotDestroyed and createBatchDraw from contract-only checks to 11 executable unit tests covering: destroyed-error swallowing, non-Error values, case sensitivity, raf scheduling, pending flag synchrony, call coalescing, destroyed-graph skip, null-ref skip, sequential batches. No TODO/FIXME/HACK, no @ts-ignore, no console.log in production code. 12 long files still deferred. All 1641 tests green.
